## Risk / safety impact

- [ ] This bug could affect live trading (HIGH PRIORITY — tag maintainer immediately)
- [ ] This bug affects validation metrics or gate verdicts
- [ ] This bug affects risk engine guards
- [ ] This is infrastructure-only (tests, CI, docs)
